task.title: Importing Dashboards created in RMF Performance Monitoring
task.shortdesc: This task describes how to import dashboards and the associated data sources created in RMF Performance Monitoring in the RMF application.

prereq.p: You must have completed the following task:

step.cmd: Go to Apps IBM RMF and navigate to the Import Dashboards from RMF Performance Monitoring section.
Verify the Destination folder path displayed under the section heading.
Click Go to PM Dashboards to review existing RMF Performance Monitoring dashboard files before importing.
In the Upload File area, drag and drop .po dashboard file or click the upload zone to browse for the file manually.

info.note: The Data sources defined in RMF Performance Monitoring dashboards are imported without credentials. After import, update each data source with valid credentials if the DDS requires authentication where required.

result.p: The dashboards exported from the RMF Performance Monitoring are successfully imported into the RMF application.
